recommendations.title: Batman Ninja vs. Yakuza League
recommendations.overview: The Batman family has returned to the present to discover that Japan has disappeared, and a giant island - Hinomoto - is now in the sky over Gotham City.  At the top sit the Yakuza, a group of superpowered individuals who reign without honor or human

recommendations.title: Predator: Killer of Killers
recommendations.overview: While three of the fiercest warriors in human history—a Viking raider, a ninja in feudal Japan, and a WWII pilot—are killers in their own right, they are merely prey for their new opponent: the ultimate killer of killers.

recommendations.title: Gintama
recommendations.overview: In an era where aliens have invaded and taken over feudal Tokyo, a young samurai finds work however he can.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 2
recommendations.overview: Batman has stopped the reign of terror that The Mutants had cast upon his city.  Now an old foe wants a reunion and the government wants The Man of Steel to put a stop to Batman.

recommendations.title: No Time for Nuts
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Scrat comes across a time machine and is transported to various times all in pursuit of his beloved acorn.

recommendations.title: Inception: The Cobol Job
recommendations.overview: Cobb, Arthur and Nash are enlisted by Cobol Engineering.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Superman vs. The Elite
recommendations.overview: The Man of Steel finds himself outshone by a new team of ruthless superheroes who hold his idealism in contempt.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.
